mapper.sql: SELECT s.id, s.app_name, s.agent_id, s.user_id, s.session_id, s.title, s.status, s.message_count, s.last_message_preview, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.last_message_at, st.state_json FROM agent_session s LEFT JOIN agent_session_state st ON st.session_id = s.session_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_session_state (session_id, state_json, updated_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{stateJson}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.session_id = #{sessionId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE'
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY s.last_message_at DESC, s.updated_at DESC
WHERE s.app_name = #{appName} AND s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY s.last_message_at DESC, s.updated_at DESC

SELECT id, session_id, event_id, invocation_id, author, content_text, content_json, event_json, partial_flag, turn_complete_flag, final_response_flag, error_message, timestamp_ms, created_at FROM agent_event WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_session SET message_count = #{messageCount}, title = #{title}, last_message_preview = #{lastMessagePreview}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, last_message_at = #{lastMessageAt} WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM agent_memory WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT id, app_name, user_id, session_id, memory_text, source, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_memory WHERE app_name = #{appName} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT id, app_name, user_id, session_id, memory_text, source, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_memory WHERE app_name = #{appName} AND user_id = #{userId} AND memory_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_session SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
